title: Safe local live concept-linking probe CLI
problem: Ticket-061 proved live Qwen claim extraction with report-only probes. Concept linking still requires persisted claims in SQLite via link-concepts and writes claim_concepts. Operators need a no-DB live probe to validate Ollama concept linking before any persistence work.
acceptance_criteria: Live probe with qwen2.5:7b yields accepted_count >= 1 on default embedded claim input.
db_writes remains false; report under data/reports/live_probes/.
validate_concept_links unchanged; GT05 still passes mock-only.
Rejected live probe rows include validation_diagnostic notes.
Mock/default pytest and CI remain green without Ollama.
test_plan: Manual live: probe-link-concepts with ollama opt-in
non_goals: Do not persist concepts or links to default DB or public exports.
Do not add OpenAI/OpenRouter or API keys.
Do not add relationship/contradiction live probes.
Do not edit ontology YAML; use existing labels in prompt calibration only.
rollback_plan: Revert CLI, probe helper, prompt calibration, and tests. No schema migrations.
